productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Solid Grey Socks
description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these ribbed grey dress socks from Reid and Taylor. Made of cotton and lycra blend fabric, these socks can be worn both for work and formal occassions.Made of superfine mercerized cotton and lycra blend for all-day comfort, stretch and absorption of sweatRibbed weave with brand name woven on the foot areaRib knit cuff with roomy toe area for superior comfort and durabilitysock careMachine wash cold in 40 degree water using mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not use softenersDo not iron, dry clean or tumble dryDry in shade
